expectations.text: Report includes sections: Scope Analyzed, Findings, Refactor Actions, Validation Plan.
expectations.evidence: Checked required section headers in report.

expectations.text: Findings classify duplication into exact duplicate, near duplicate, or reimplementation.
expectations.evidence: Checked presence of all three duplication classes.

expectations.text: Validation plan is repository-agnostic and does not hardcode Next.js-only commands.
expectations.evidence: Checked validation content for framework-specific Next.js-only commands.
